sourceTitle: Undergraduate and Graduate Admissions AI Policy: Guidelines for Fall Applicants
evidenceSnippetOriginal: The Undergraduate Faculty Admissions and Graduate Studies committees convened and have approved of the following ethical guidelines for the use of AI in the Fall 2026 application cycle. As access to AI continues to grow and the technology evolves, so will our recommendations and expectations for future application cycles.
